title: The Classic Pin
description: White's bishop on b5 pins the knight to the king — capture it to win material!

title: Knight Fork Fiesta
description: A single knight leap attacks the queen and rook at the same time — grab material!

title: Scholar's Trap
description: Black played Nf6?? walking into the famous Scholar's Mate — deliver the killer queen move!

title: Discovered Check
description: The knight leaps to f7 — forking queen and rook while delivering a devastating check!

title: Back-Rank Blaster
description: The rook slides all the way to a8 — the king has nowhere to run. Checkmate!
